overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval stone building interior illuminated by warm firelight, transitioning to a night-time exterior balcony, and descending to a cobblestone courtyard where he encounters guards in a narrow alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor stone corridor and fireplace room

events.description: entering interior room with lit fireplace from stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs and entering a warm room with a burning fireplace

entered.detail: rough grey stone blocks with mortar, forming the corridor walls
steep wooden staircase with dark timber steps leading upward
dark wooden door frame leading to interior room
large stone hearth with active fire providing warm orange light
dark wooden floorboards worn with age

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone corridor with rough grey walls. The character ascends wooden stairs and enters a room dominated by a large stone fireplace with a warm fire, casting flickering orange light across the wooden floorboards and beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor wooden bedroom and hallway

events.description: ascending narrow wooden staircase to upper floor

agents.ego_description: moving through upper floor rooms with timber-framed walls and sparse furniture

entered.detail: vertical wooden planks forming the interior walls of the upper floor
simple wooden bed frame with straw mattress
small rectangular window with blue night light visible
wooden door frame leading to exterior balcony

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper floor where stone walls give way to wooden paneling. A simple wooden bed sits against the wall near a small window showing blue night light. The character continues ascending toward a doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior balcony and descent to courtyard

events.description: exiting building onto stone balcony with view of night sky and exterior walls
dropping down from balcony ledge to lower cobblestone courtyard

agents.ego_description: stepping onto a stone balcony overlooking the night exterior, then descending to the courtyard below

entered.detail: tall stone fortress walls with crenellations visible against night sky
dark blue night sky visible above the stone walls
narrow stone ledge with wooden railing overlooking the courtyard
clay tiled roof of the lower structure visible below the balcony
wall-mounted iron torch holder with burning flame
cobblestone courtyard surface illuminated by torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character exits through a doorway onto a stone balcony revealing the night exterior with tall fortress walls and dark blue sky. After a brief look, the character drops down from the balcony to a cobblestone courtyard below, passing by a lit wall sconce.

events.description: encountering group of guards in red uniforms standing near a fire

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow cobblestone alley and approaching guards near a wall fire

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms standing near a fire, one holding a torch

entered.detail: rough wooden scaffolding structure against the stone wall
stone archway leading to another section of the fortress

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by high stone walls. Wooden scaffolding appears on the right as the character approaches a group of guards standing near a wall-mounted fire. The scene is dimly lit by torchlight against the dark stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed interior of a stone building out into a cold, dimly lit fortress courtyard at night. It begins in a narrow stone corridor, ascending wooden stairs into a room where a large fireplace casts flickering orange light across wooden beams and floorboards. As the character moves through the upper floor, the stone walls shift to wooden paneling near a simple bed and a window revealing a deep blue night sky. The scene then opens as the character exits through a doorway onto a stone balcony overlooking high fortress walls before dropping down to a cobblestone courtyard. Finally, the camera follows the character through a narrow alley flanked by high walls and wooden scaffolding, moving toward a group of guards illuminated by torchlight against the dark stone architecture.
